reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, sent a math question, and received the correct response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with agent sidebar visible showing three agents including "QA-20260424-222154-0kwe"
Clicked on "QA-20260424-222154-0kwe" agent in the sidebar - Agent detail page opened successfully with the agent's chat interface
Verified agent status is "idle" - Confirmed status indicator shows "idle" (acceptable status per requirements)
Clicked on message input field - Input field became active and ready for typing
Typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" into the message input - Message text successfully entered in the input field
Clicked send button - Message was sent successfully, initiating a new chat session named "Quick Math Verification Session" with agent status changing to "working"
Waited up to 3 minutes for response - Agent processed the request and returned a response within 1 second (displayed "Worked for 1s")
Verified response mentions "4" - Agent's response clearly displays "4" which correctly answers the mathematical question 2+2=4
Took final screenshot - Screenshot captured showing the chat session with the user's message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and the agent's correct response "4", with agent status back to "idle"
